metadata.visibility_note: Regression and generalization inputs were repository-visible before S-023; blind material was held out until after freeze.

package_metadata.methodological_note: Blind to Codex if withheld, but synthetic and model-authored rather than independently human-authored. Use it for held-out boundary scoring; retain later blinded human A/B preference as the final qualitative adoption evidence.
package_metadata.visibility: Keep outside the active repository and outside Codex prompts until tuning is frozen.

Validated 16 sealed blind cases.
